puzzle.hint: This verse emphasizes the importance and reward of placing complete trust and reliance on Allah in all matters.
puzzle.verseEn: And He will provide for him from where not he thinks And whoever puts his trust upon Allah then He is sufficient for him Indeed Allah will accomplish His purpose Indeed has set Allah for every thing a measure
puzzle.arabic: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَـٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدْرًۭا
words: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ
قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدْرًۭا
